_description: Per-model prompting optimizations. Loaded by llm_runner.py to auto-apply temperature overrides and system prompt wrapping.

opus.system_preamble: Structure your reasoning using XML tags (e.g., <analysis>, <evidence>, <conclusion>).

chatgpt-5.4.system_preamble: Follow the CTCO framework: provide Context, then Task, then Constraints, then Output format.

gpt-5.2.system_preamble: Follow the CTCO framework: provide Context, then Task, then Constraints, then Output format.

gemini-3-pro.system_preamble: Place critical constraints after data context. Structure output with XML-style section tags.

gemini-3-flash.system_preamble: Structure output with clear section headings.
